title: IIEST Shibpur Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for Technical Assistant Posts
description: The Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology, Shibpur (IIEST Shibpur) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Technical Assistant Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, Diploma in Computer Science Engineering, M.Sc., MCA can apply for the IIEST Shibpur Jobs 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mo...
